title: sideroxylon hirtiantherum
intro: Sideroxylon hirtiantherum, also known as the hairy anther tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. Its health benefits are said to include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as antimicrobial properties that help protect against infections. Herbal preparations of Sideroxylon hirtiantherum may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
